# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: gateway
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway # use Istio's default controller
  servers:
    - port:
        number: 80
        name: http
        protocol: HTTP
      hosts:
         - "*"
          filters:
           - name: router
             config:
               prefixHeaders:
                 enable: true
                 addPrefixMap:
                 - prefixStringRegex: "1.2.3"
                   headerName: x-global-prefix
                   value: prefix-one

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: ingressroute
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*"
  gateways:
    - gateway
  http:
    - match:
      - headers:
         path:
            exact: /
            prefix: true
       route:
        - destination:
           host: podinfo
           port:
             number: 9876
          weight: 100

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: ingressroute-dest
spec:
   host: podinfo
   subsets:
     - name: v1
       labels:
         version: v1
         app: ingressgateway
     - name: v2
       labels:
         version: v2
         app: ingressgateway
  trafficPolicy:
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
   name: podinfo-rule
spec:
     host: podinfo.default.svc.cluster.local
     subsets:
       - name: v2
         labels:
           version: "v2"
    trafficPolicy:
      loadBalancer:
        simple: ROUND_ROBIN
        stickyLB:
          cookie:
            name: podinfo-cookie

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: podinfo-service-entry
  namespace: ingressroute
spec:
    hosts:
      - "podinfo"
    ports:
       - number: 9876
         name: http
     resolution: DNS_SVC
